title: New York Times allegedly used AI to spy on unionized employees
description: Unionized New York Times employees have taken legal action against the publication, claiming it uses artificial intelligence to "surveil and monitor" them.
content:
Unionized New York Times employees have taken legal action against the publication, claiming it uses artificial intelligence to “surveil and monitor” them.

title: Gallup Poll: Most Teachers Get No Guidance on Using AI
description: With most teachers saying they are largely being left on their own to figure it out, a new Gallup poll is raising concerns about how America's schools are handling the rapid rise of artificial intelligence in the classroom.
content:

title: Youtube says will flag AI
description: Youtube will now automatically identify AI-generated videos. This new policy will inform viewers if content is created using artificial intelligence. Previously, creators had to self-report AI usage. This change comes as AI technology advances rapidly. Creators can challenge incorrect labels. The flagging will not affect video recommendations. Other platforms like Spotify are also implementing similar AI detection measures.
content:
Synopsis

title: National artificial intelligence strategy to be released next week, Carney says
description: OTTAWA — The federal government will introduce its long-awaited AI strategy within days, Prime Minister Mark Carney said Wednesday. “It’s coming out next week,” Carney told reporters on Parliament Hill.
content:
OTTAWA — The federal government will introduce its long-awaited AI strategy within days, Prime Minister Mark Carney said Wednesday.
“It’s coming out next week,” Carney told reporters on Parliament Hill.

title: Salesforce earnings can put AI fears to bed, give stock a lift
description: While software stocks rebound from the artificial intelligence-driven wipeout earlier this year, Salesforce Inc. hasn't really benefited. But its earnings after the close Wednesday could pull the company's shares out of their malaise.
content:

title: Artificial intelligence in mental health settings inherits human bias
description: A new viewpoint article published in JMIR Mental Health warns that artificial intelligence (AI) systems used in mental health settings may inherit and reinforce unreliable human input unless new safeguards are adopted.

title: How AI Bias Affects State Audit Selection
description: Tax Notes reporters Paul Jones and Emily Hollingsworth discuss how bias in artificial intelligence can affect automated systems that select taxpayers for audits and what their investigation of California's and New York’s audit selection processes revealed.

title: UK and allies have narrowing window to stay ahead in tech race, spy chief says
description: UNSTOPPABLE FORCE OF AI With the speed of technological ⁠change, ​such as the advancements in artificial intelligence, she said the "ground beneath our feet is shifting" and Britain and its allies faced a challenge to stay ahead of the competition, not least from China.
